textPlain: Note that this is just announcing that the surgery "is expected to take place soon" - it's not a story about a successful operation. The news is that they received approval to do this as a trial with eight patients a few months back, and now have the first patient going through the process.

Reminds me of this research: https://kclpure.kcl.ac.uk/portal/en/publications/enrichment-...
Amazing how far we managed to get in less than 3 years!
